violations.text: An allergy statement is lacking on the menu. Allergy statement to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
the 3-bay sink is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. 3-bay to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
The door to the bathroom in the kitchen is not self-closing. PIC stated they will purchase self closing hinges. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
